pkgmetadata.longdescription: pyKMLpyKML is a Python package for parsing and authoring KML documents. It is basedon the lxml.objectify API (httpcodespeak.netlxmlobjectify.html) whichprovides Pythonic access to XML documents... figure httppykml.googlecode.comhgdocssourcelogopyKML_logo_200x200.png scale 100 alt pyKML logoSee the Package Documentation for information on installation and usage.
